if_operator_overrides_and_picks_OOS_AUTH.downstream_step: AUTHORIZE S8-D1 P8 lifecycle transition + OOS-deliberation plan (PLAN-ONLY)
if_operator_overrides_and_picks_OOS_AUTH.operator_judgement_basis: Operator may judge K10 informally satisfied (e.g., from prior cross-asset diversification literature for NQ/GC/ZN/CL) or accept the K10-unknown risk.
what_P8_OOS_plan_must_NOT_include: Actual OOS data load (separate P8.5 authorization)
what_P8_OOS_plan_must_include: Explicit acknowledgement that K10 was NOT computed
OOS run plan (window 2023-01-01..2025-12-30; same driver; same CONFIG; cost tiers TBD)
Pre-OOS-run checklist (driver byte-stable, cache complete, K1-K12 re-evaluable thresholds locked)
DR4 evaluation plan (IS-pos / OOS-neg @ S0 -> ESCALATE)
P8 lifecycle disposition decision tree (PASS_OOS -> ?; FAIL_OOS_K -> park; FAIL_OOS_DR -> reject_fast)

boundaries_for_K10_run: Do not commit until separately authorized

downstream_after_K10.if_K10_fires_avg_corr_gt_0_50: P8 lifecycle transition records PARKED_FAILED_AT_DIVERSIFICATION_HYPOTHESIS per Tier-N rejection_gates; s8-D1 candidate parks permanently; chain continues to s9-* alternative direction (e.g., D3 from S8 plan).
downstream_after_K10.if_K10_pass_avg_corr_le_0_50: P8 lifecycle transition becomes OOS-AUTHORIZATION_DELIBERATION candidate; would require fresh operator authorization for both the P8 sealed transition and the actual OOS run plan.

expected_inputs.computation: For each market, derive daily RTH OHLCV per existing driver semantics; compute daily log-returns; compute Pearson correlation across the 6 unique market pairs (NQ-GC, NQ-ZN, NQ-CL, GC-ZN, GC-CL, ZN-CL); report per-pair correlation + average pairwise correlation.
expected_inputs.data_source: Existing local Databento cache only (480 files, 129,789,451 bytes; s7-D1 P5 cache reused; no fetch)
expected_inputs.decode: db.DBNStore.from_file via the existing in_sample_driver's derive_rth_daily_bars (or a fresh helper that mirrors it)

expected_outputs.contents: per-pair correlation matrix, average pairwise correlation, K10 fire status, sealed-chain inheritance

k10_computation_plan_PLAN_ONLY_REQUIRES_.expected_runtime: ~5-10 minutes wall (decoding for correlation needs the full daily-bar set, same as the s8-D1 driver does)
k10_computation_plan_PLAN_ONLY_REQUIRES_.purpose: Compute K10 (avg_pairwise_correlation > 0.50) over 2013-01-01..2022-12-30 across NQ/GC/ZN/CL daily returns.
k10_computation_plan_PLAN_ONLY_REQUIRES_.required_authorization: AUTHORIZE S8-D1 P7.5 K10 correlation computation (PLAN+RUN combined; mechanical compute only)

DR2_like_in_sample_material_degradation_.definition: material in-sample degradation S1->S2 OR S1->S3: sharpe drops >50% OR sharpe/expectancy flip negative
DR2_like_in_sample_material_degradation_.note: DR2 is preregistered for OOS context; we use an in-sample analog as an early warning

DR3_zero_cost_only_survival.definition: S0 positive (sharpe AND expectancy) but ALL of S1/S2/S3/S4 negative

DR4_IS_positive_OOS_negative_S0_baseline.note: OOS not run; DR4 not evaluable this turn

DR5_cost_stress_turns_edge_negative_S0_t.definition: S0 positive (sharpe OR expectancy) but S1 negative (same metric)

if_K10_computation_blocked_for_any_reaso.next_authorization_block: AUTHORIZE S8-D1 P8 default park (preserves all evidence; no live/paper changes)

if_K10_fires.next_authorization_block: AUTHORIZE S8-D1 P8 lifecycle transition to PARKED_FAILED_AT_DIVERSIFICATION_HYPOTHESIS

if_K10_passes.next_authorization_block: AUTHORIZE S8-D1 P8 lifecycle transition + OOS authorization plan (PLAN-ONLY)

recommendation.honest_qualification: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is a research label only; 6-gate live-block applies regardless. This memo does NOT recommend live trading. This memo does NOT recommend paper trading. This memo records the s8-D1 candidate's in-sample diagnostic posture and recommends the next research step, which is K10 computation.
recommendation.rationale: The s8-D1 candidate is the cleanest in-sample result in the entire chain: 0 K-fires at S1 baseline, A8 PASS on cost-stress matrix, K12 not fired, no-pyramid invariant pass across all 5 tiers, all 4 markets profitable, MaxDD ~9.3x lower than s7-D1. HOWEVER, the preregistered K10 rejection_gate (avg_pairwise_correlation > 0.50) has NOT been computed; the entire premise of cross-asset Donchian selection (D1 at 39/40 in the S8 plan) rests on the assumption that the 4-market universe maintains low average correlation, enabling diversification. Going to OOS without K10 risks the failure mode where OOS deliberation is granted, then K10 is computed and fires, then the candidate parks anyway -- wasting operator attention. Computing K10 first is cheap and high-information: pass -> strengthens the OOS-AUTHORIZE case substantially; fire -> PARKED_FAILED_AT_DIVERSIFICATION_HYPOTHESIS per Tier-N spec, ending the candidate's lifecycle cleanly.

selected_rejected_options_rationale.FRESH_S9_REQUIRED: Unwarranted by the evidence. The s8-D1 candidate cleared every preregistered K-gate that was evaluated. Nothing in the result mandates a fresh candidate. A fresh s9-* should be reserved for cases where the candidate's evidence is exhausted negative.
selected_rejected_options_rationale.OOS_AUTHORIZATION_DELIBERATION: Premature without K10 evidence. The cross-asset diversification hypothesis is load-bearing to the entire D1 selection (S8 plan scored 39/40 specifically because D1 'directly tests the unfixed K4 root cause' on a low-correlation universe). K10 should be evidenced before OOS attention is invested.
selected_rejected_options_rationale.PARK_SAFE_BUT_NOT_MONEY_PROVEN: Overly conservative. K10 not computed is an OPEN evidence gap, not a fire. Parking this candidate as PARKED_SAFE_BUT_NOT_MONEY_PROVEN before computing K10 would prematurely lock in a parking-with-known-unevaluated-gate state when the gate is cheap to evaluate.

what_this_memo_does_NOT_authorize: OOS data load / decode / inspection / metric compute
P8 lifecycle transition (requires separate authorization based on K10 outcome)

DR4_not_evaluable_this_chain.description: DR4 (IS positive but OOS negative at S0 baseline -> ESCALATE) is not evaluable in-sample-only. It becomes evaluable only after OOS is run, which is BLOCKED until separate authorization.

K10_correlation_not_computed.compute_feasibility: Computing K10 is mechanically cheap: pairwise daily-return correlation across NQ/GC/ZN/CL over 10 years from the same DBN cache; ~minutes of additional runtime (4 markets -> 6 pairs).
K10_correlation_not_computed.consequence_if_fires_later: The cross-asset diversification hypothesis that motivated D1 selection from the S8 plan would be falsified, mandating a park.
K10_correlation_not_computed.description: Tier-N spec rejection_gate K10 = `avg_pairwise_correlation > 0.50` over 2013-01-01..2022-12-30; the driver does NOT compute this at runtime; K10 status is UNKNOWN.
K10_correlation_not_computed.recommended_disposition: Compute K10 BEFORE any OOS authorization deliberation.

K10_status_blocks_strong_OOS_recommendat.description: Because K10 has not been computed, the in-sample evidence is INCOMPLETE relative to the preregistered K-criteria set. A strong OOS-AUTHORIZATION recommendation requires K10 evidence either way.

OOS_window_not_inspected.consequence: In-sample alone is INSUFFICIENT evidence for any live-trading recommendation, even at READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST verdict.
OOS_window_not_inspected.description: OOS window 2023-01-01..2025-12-30 has NOT been loaded, decoded, or evaluated. Per plan-lock invariant `oos_inspection_during_in_sample_run_prohibited = True`, OOS remains untouchable until in-sample passes all preregistered gates AND a separate explicit OOS authorization is issued.

live_remains_blocked_permanently.description: 6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict in this memo. FRC has never been granted to this candidate or any candidate in the chain. live_promotion_path_closed = True.

no_profitability_claim.description: This memo records what was observed in-sample under preregistered methodology. Past performance in-sample is NOT predictive of OOS performance or live performance. The result is DIAGNOSTIC ONLY.

sample_size_modest.description: P6 baseline closed_trades_portfolio = 111 (margin of 11 above K9 threshold of 100). Cost-stress S4 dropped to 99 (K9 fires by 1 trade at S4 only; S4 is preregistered as 'tail stress, informational only').
sample_size_modest.implication: Statistical power for per-market sub-analyses is constrained (NQ=18, GC=28, ZN=48, CL=17). Per-market expectancy estimates have wide confidence intervals at these sample sizes.
mitigation_options: Accept as-is (the candidate cleared K9 at S0/S1/S2/S3; tier_n_spec gates are met)
Schedule OOS-augmentation to grow effective sample (each OOS-confirmed trade adds independent information)
Author a fresh _revN_ that extends in-sample to 2010-2022 (would re-fetch ~3 years extra; requires separate operator-side fetch)

single_delta_from_s7_d1_outcome_contrast.interpretation: Removing pyramid (max_units 4 -> 1) reduced MaxDD by ~9.3x (from -221.67% to -23.83%) while preserving the cross-asset signal direction. Sharpe and P/L-ratio both IMPROVED. All 4 markets now profitable (vs s7-D1 had GC losing). Per-trade expectancy halved in absolute terms ($1,743 vs $3,667) because winners no longer pyramid-amplify, but risk-adjusted return is materially better. Trade count dropped from 313 to 111 (still >= K9=100).
